title: dicella bracteosa var. holosericea
intro: Dicella bracteosa var. holosericea is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dicella bracteosa var. holosericea include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
